import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const testimonials = [ { id: 1, text: 'Fayzan meets you where you are with incredible empathy and lack of judgement, and he combines this compassionate approach with a set of practical tools that help you articulate your goals & come up with a plan of action. Working with Fayzan allowed me to rapidly step into the best version of myself in a way that feels genuine and lasting.', name: 'Aatash Parikh', role: 'Founder at Inkwire', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1539571696357-5a69c17a67c6?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't1', }, { id: 2, text: "Fayzan's mix of sharp (and direct) questions, frameworks, and calm nature helped me turn a half-formed idea into a business that let me walk away from corporate life on my own terms. I went from employee to founder with an owner's mindset.", name: 'Tayyab Rizvi', role: 'Founder & CEO', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500648767791-00dcc994a43e?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't2', }, { id: 3, text: 'Fayzan brings a rare combination of intellectual rigor and genuine compassion. His medical background and years in high-growth tech give him a uniquely grounded perspective on leadership transformation.', name: 'Dr. Joe Tabar', role: 'Chief Medical Officer', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't3', }, { id: 4, text: 'I came to Fayzan feeling like there were so many things wrong with me. Through his extremely insightful questioning, he enabled me to realize that I should be coming from a place of love for myself vs. doubt. After the first month, it was life-changing.', name: 'Simon', role: 'Doctor & Director', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't4', }, { id: 5, text: 'One of the most transformative investments I made in my adult life.', name: 'Neil Tolia', role: 'Senior PM at Spotify', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519085360753-af0119f7cbe7?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't5', }, { id: 6, text: 'Working with Fayzan changed the way I navigate ambiguity — professionally and personally. He asks the questions no one else thinks to ask, and then stays in the discomfort with you until something real emerges.', name: 'J.P. Hutchins', role: 'General Partner at Metaversal', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1570295999919-56ceb5ecca61?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't6', }, { id: 7, text: "Fayzan helped me find clarity at a moment when everything felt noisy. He listened with a depth that most people don't, and what he reflected back changed how I thought about leadership entirely.", name: 'Malena Lopez-Sotelo', role: 'VP of Operations', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580489944761-15a19d654956?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't1', }, { id: 8, text: "I've worked with coaches before, but nothing like this. Fayzan doesn't give you confidence — he helps you find them yourself, and makes you confident in them. That's a much more durable outcome.", name: 'Derek Evansen', role: 'Executive Director', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-53994a69daeb?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't2', }, { id: 9, text: "Fayzan's unique value is at the intersection of the worlds he's been in. He's able to help access many different perspectives: business, entrepreneurship, medical, psychiatric, spiritual and holistic. All wrapped in a spirituality and vulnerability that, as a man, many struggle with.", name: 'Andrew Barkal', role: 'Founder & Chairman', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=80&h=80&fit=crop&crop=face&auto=format', colorClass: 't3', }, ]; export default function Coaching() { return (
{/* ── HERO ── */}
Coaching

For founders at{' '} inflection points.

I work with tech founders navigating strategic pivots, cofounder tension, or identity shifts clouding their clarity in a rapidly evolving ecosystem.

{/* ── IRREPLACEABLE ── */}
The Irreplaceable Part

Your peers are using AI for everything. So are you. But there's a category of problem that doesn't get solved by another tool, framework, or podcast. The ones that require someone who knows your history, holds your contradictions without judgment, and shows up the same way every session.

Fayzan works with a small number of clients at a time — by design. The relationship is the work.

{/* ── SERVICES ── */}
What's Offered

Services

1:1 Coaching

1:1 Coaching

Ongoing, high-touch engagement. The relationship deepens over time — and so does the work. Individual sessions with each client, designed to explore what's actually happening, surface what's actually happening, and find a clear path forward.

Fayzan keeps a deliberately small roster.

Get started →
Co-Founder Mediation

Co-Founder Mediation

A structured process for founding teams in conflict. Individual and joint sessions — designed to restore trust and find a clear path forward. Fayzan holds the space for both people to be fully heard.

For founding teams navigating tension, misalignment, or conflict.

Get started →
{/* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */}
Client Experiences

What people say

{testimonials.map((t) => (

{t.name}
{t.role}
))}
{/* ── CTA ── */}

Ready to begin?

Reach out to schedule an introductory conversation.

fayzanrabcoaching@gmail.com
); }
